title: Melted Lemony Egyptian Chicken Kebabs
description: A citrusy and gooey Egyptian dish featuring lemon, perfect for a post-workout meal, made with gluten-free friendly ingredients and cooked on a robata-grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the robata-grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the kebabs with additional lemon juice.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and sprinkle with lemon zest.
Let the kebabs rest for 2 minutes before serving.
